restaurants.name: The Mainlander
restaurants.notes: partial render — verify manually. All 46 WebFetch requests (23 dates × seats=2 and seats=4) returned HTTP 403 (Resy bot-protection); WebSearch fallback returned only generic Resy listing pages with no per-date time-slot data. Fixed seatings at 6:00 PM and 8:30 PM; only 6:00 PM seating was in scope. Sundays may have no service. Visit https://resy.com/cities/st-louis-mo/venues/mainlander to check and book directly — July 2026 slots released June 1 at noon and sell fast.
